text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Actually, I was encountering the same problem, but I got it to work by
building it against the pcap from net/libpcap rather than nmap's
internal pcap. So maybe if IPV6 is disabled, there could be some logic
in the Makefile to require net/libpcap as a prerequisite and add
"--with-libpcap=$PREFIX" to CONFIGURE_ARGS.
